response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong TypeScript skills and recent exposure to Model Context Protocol (MCP) and AI-agent infrastructure, he lacks the required 8+ years of experience specifically building and shipping AI-driven solutions. His background is missing demonstrated expertise in Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation pipelines, which are critical for this specialized GenAI role.
strengths: Strong foundational engineering background with a BS in Computer Science and over 15 years of full-stack software development experience.
Demonstrated Staff-level technical leadership, including open-source platform development, infrastructure design, and team mentoring.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling using TypeScript.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
Lacks practical experience with Python, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
No demonstrated background in building LLM evaluation pipelines, observability frameworks, or optimizing LLM performance metrics.
